info.name: PetNabor — Tip System
info.description: All API endpoints for the PetNabor Tip System (Stripe Connect onboarding, sending tips, balance, withdrawal, settings, and webhook).

variable.description: Base URL of the API server. Change to your staging/prod URL as needed.
Bearer access token obtained from the auth endpoint.

item.name: Stripe Connect
item.description: Endpoints for creating and checking a user's Stripe Express Connected Account (needed before receiving tips).

request.description:
Creates a Stripe Express account for the current user (if not yet created) and returns a short-lived onboarding URL. If the account already exists, returns a fresh URL.

**Auth:** Bearer token required.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "account": {
    "stripe_account_id": "acct_xxx",
    "is_onboarding_complete": false,
    "is_charges_enabled": false,
    "is_payouts_enabled": false,
    "is_fully_verified": false,
    "created_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
    "updated_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
  },
  "onboarding_url": "https://connect.stripe.com/..."
}
```

Fetches and syncs the current user's Stripe Connect account status from Stripe. Returns 404 if no account exists.

**Auth:** Bearer token required.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "stripe_account_id": "acct_xxx",
  "is_onboarding_complete": true,
  "is_charges_enabled": true,
  "is_payouts_enabled": true,
  "is_fully_verified": true,
  "created_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z",
  "updated_at": "2024-01-01T00:00:00Z"
}
```

item.name: Tip
item.description: Endpoints for sending tips, viewing tip history, checking balance, and reading platform settings.

request.description:
Creates a Stripe PaymentIntent for the tip. The mobile SDK uses the returned `client_secret` to complete the payment on the client side.

**Auth:** Bearer token required.

**Business Rules:**
- Cannot tip yourself
- Amount must be between `minimum_tip_amount` and `maximum_tip_amount` (see `/tip/settings/`)
- Recipient must have a fully verified Stripe Connect account
- If `meeting_id` is provided, both tipper and recipient must be participants of that meeting

**Response (201):**
```json
{
  "tip": {
    "id": "uuid",
    "tipper": { "id": "uuid", "first_name": "John", "last_name": "Doe", "email": "john@example.com" },
    "recipient": { "id": "uuid", "first_name": "Jane", "last_name": "Doe", "email": "jane@example.com" },
    "meeting_id": "uuid or null",
    "amount": "10.00",
    "commission_percentage": "20.00",
    "commission_amount": "2.00",
    "recipient_amount": "8.00",
    "note": "Great session!",
    "status": "pending",
    "currency": "usd",
    "stripe_payment_intent_id": "pi_xxx",
    "created_at": "...",
    "updated_at": "..."
  },
  "client_secret": "pi_xxx_secret_xxx",
  "publishable_key": "pk_live_xxx"
}
```

query.description: Optional. Filter by status: pending | succeeded | failed | refunded | cancelled

request.description:
Returns tip history for the current user.

**Auth:** Bearer token required.

**Query Params:**
| Param | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `direction` | `sent`, `received`, `all` | `all` |
| `status` | `pending`, `succeeded`, `failed`, `refunded`, `cancelled` | *(all statuses)* |
Tip history filtered to tips the current user has **sent**.
Tip history filtered to tips the current user has **received**.

Returns the user's available USD balance on their Stripe Connected Account (i.e., earnings ready to withdraw).

**Auth:** Bearer token required.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "available_balance": "42.50",
  "currency": "usd",
  "minimum_withdrawal": "10.00"
}
```

Returns the platform-wide tip configuration set by the admin.

**Auth:** Bearer token required.

**Response:**
```json
{
  "commission_percentage": "20.00",
  "minimum_tip_amount": "1.00",
  "maximum_tip_amount": "500.00",
  "minimum_withdrawal_amount": "10.00"
}
```

item.name: Withdrawal
item.description: Endpoints for requesting a payout of earned tips and viewing withdrawal history.

request.description:
Initiates a Stripe Payout to the user's bank account via their Connected Account. The withdrawal is created in `pending` status and updated to `paid` or `failed` by a Stripe webhook.

**Auth:** Bearer token required.

**Business Rules:**
- User must have a fully verified Stripe Connect account
- Amount must be ≥ `minimum_withdrawal_amount`
- Amount must not exceed available balance

**Response (201):**
```json
{
  "id": "uuid",
  "amount": "25.00",
  "currency": "usd",
  "status": "pending",
  "stripe_payout_id": "po_xxx",
  "failure_message": "",
  "created_at": "...",
  "updated_at": "..."
}
```

Returns all withdrawal requests for the current user ordered by most recent first.

**Auth:** Bearer token required.

item.name: Webhook (Stripe → Server)
item.description: Stripe-facing webhook. Do NOT call this manually in production — it is called by Stripe only.

header.description: Computed HMAC signature sent by Stripe. Required for signature verification.

request.description:
Called by Stripe to notify the server of payment events. **No auth token needed** — verified via `Stripe-Signature` header HMAC.

**Handled events:**
- `payment_intent.succeeded`
- `payment_intent.payment_failed`
- `payment_intent.canceled`
- `charge.refunded`
- `account.updated`
- `payout.paid`
- `payout.failed`
